entity.summary: Post-graduation constant-product decentralized exchange for Durianfun markets on Bitkub Chain, pairing launchpad tokens against native KUB through dedicated AMM pools.
entity.notes: Current open-source registry adapters track Durianfun production factories, graduated AMM pools, swap events, fees, and liquidity through the 2026 V4.6.7 production generation. A stable first-party public website was not independently recovered, so URL fields remain unset and confidence is medium.

evidence.title: Durianfun production liquidity adapter
evidence.notes: Current adapter documents four Durianfun production generations, including V4.6.7 deployed in May 2026, and tracks native KUB and KKUB liquidity across bonding-curve markets and graduated AMM pools.

evidence.title: Durian AMM swap-volume adapter
evidence.notes: DEX adapter identifies dedicated DurianAMM pools created when Durianfun markets graduate and calculates current KUB-denominated swap volume, fees, protocol revenue, and liquidity-provider revenue from on-chain events.
